description: If checked, clicking this workspace in the sidebar redirects directly to the URL below instead of opening the workspace page.
label: Instant Redirect
name: Workspace-instant_redirect

description: URL to redirect to. Internal /app/* routes navigate softly (SPA); external or filtered URLs do a full navigation. e.g. /app/trip, /wiki, https://chat.example.com
label: Redirect URL
name: Workspace-redirect_url
